metadata.name: File a Zero Sales Tax Return

description: A new business was registered for sales tax but had no sales during its first quarter. It still needs to file a return.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the business had zero gross sales for the reporting period.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the lack of sales activity.

nodes.task_description: Access the state's online tax portal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs in to the state filing system.

nodes.task_description: Prepare and file a sales tax return showing zero sales and zero tax due.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully files the required zero return on time.
